parameters.query:
=SELECT
    c.cart_id,
    c.user_id,
    c.store_id,
    ci.sku,
    i.item_name AS original_name,
    ci.quantity,
    i.stock,
    i.unit,
    ci.price_at_addition AS unit_price
FROM public.cart_items ci
JOIN public.inventory i ON ci.sku = i.sku
JOIN public.carts c ON ci.cart_id = c.cart_id
WHERE c.user_id = '{{ $json.tool_input.chat_id }}'
AND c.status = 'active';

=INSERT INTO public.pending_orders (
  order_id,
  chat_id,
  store_id,
  status,
  final_order_total,
  order_details_json,
  created_at,
  expires_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.order_id }}',
  {{ $json.chat_id }},
  {{ $json.store_id }},
  'awaiting_confirmation',
  {{ $json.final_order_total }},
  '{{ $json.order_details_json_safe }}'::jsonb,
  NOW(),
  NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
)
ON CONFLICT (order_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'awaiting_confirmation',
  final_order_total = EXCLUDED.final_order_total,
  order_details_json = EXCLUDED.order_details_json,
  expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes',
  updated_at = NOW();

SELECT promo_code, discount_type, discount_value, min_cart_value, description
FROM public.promotions
WHERE is_active = true
  AND (valid_from IS NULL OR NOW() >= valid_from)
  AND (valid_until IS NULL OR NOW() <= valid_until)
ORDER BY priority DESC, discount_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

=SELECT
    c.cart_id,
    c.user_id,
    c.store_id,
    ci.sku,
    i.item_name AS original_name,
    ci.quantity,
    i.stock,
    i.unit,
    ci.price_at_addition AS unit_price
FROM public.cart_items ci
JOIN public.inventory i ON ci.sku = i.sku
JOIN public.carts c ON ci.cart_id = c.cart_id
WHERE c.user_id = '{{ $json.tool_input.chat_id }}'
AND c.status = 'active';

=INSERT INTO public.pending_orders (
  order_id,
  chat_id,
  store_id,
  status,
  final_order_total,
  order_details_json,
  created_at,
  expires_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.order_id }}',
  {{ $json.chat_id }},
  {{ $json.store_id }},
  'awaiting_confirmation',
  {{ $json.final_order_total }},
  '{{ $json.order_details_json_safe }}'::jsonb,
  NOW(),
  NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
)
ON CONFLICT (order_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'awaiting_confirmation',
  final_order_total = EXCLUDED.final_order_total,
  order_details_json = EXCLUDED.order_details_json,
  expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes',
  updated_at = NOW();

SELECT promo_code, discount_type, discount_value, min_cart_value, description
FROM public.promotions
WHERE is_active = true
  AND (valid_from IS NULL OR NOW() >= valid_from)
  AND (valid_until IS NULL OR NOW() <= valid_until)
ORDER BY priority DESC, discount_value DESC
LIMIT 1;
